info.title: SimRailInformationTools (SIT) API
info.description:
The SimRailInformationTools (SIT) API provides a comprehensive suite of endpoints designed to access detailed
data about various aspects of the SimRail ecosystem. This API offers functionalities to interact with vehicles,
railcars, journeys, users, dispatch posts, and more.
Information capabilities:
 - Vehicles and Railcars: Technical Specification, Journey Compositions, Usage in Journeys, etc.
 - Journeys: Live, Historic & Future Detail Data about Journeys, Finding/Resolving of Journeys, etc.
 - Servers: Live & Historic Information about Servers
 - Dispatch Posts: Live & Historic Information about Dispatch Posts
 - Points: Detail Information about Points for Journeys Timetables
 - Events: Websocket providing Live Data Changes for Journeys, Dispatch Posts and Servers

post.summary: Get a batch of detailed user information (up to 250)
post.description:
Get a batch of detailed user information (up to 250) in a single request. If an id is provided which can't be
resolved to a user info, the id is skipped and there will be no reference to the id in the response array.

requestBody.description: An array containing the base information (platform and id) of the users to resolve

200.description: The request was processed successfully

400.description: The given request body is invalid

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

post.summary: Get a batch of railcars (up to 250) by their id

requestBody.description: An array containing the ids of the railcars to resolve

200.description: The railcars that were successfully resolved based on the given input ids

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

post.summary: Get a batch of points (up to 250) by their id
post.description:
Get a batch of points (up to 250) in a single request. If an id is provided which doesn't have a point associated,
the id is skipped and there will be no reference to the id in the response array

requestBody.description: An array containing the ids of the points to resolve

200.description: The points that were successfully resolved based on the given input ids

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

post.summary: Get a batch of journeys (up to 250) by their id

requestBody.description: An array containing the ids of the journeys to resolve

200.description: The journeys that were successfully resolved based on the given input ids

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Get the vehicle composition of a journey

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the journey to get the vehicle composition of

parameters.name: If-Modified-Since
parameters.description: If provided the response body is empty in case the data didn't change since the given date

200.description: The vehicle sequence for the journey with the given id was successfully resolved

304.description: The request was successful but the content was not modified since the last request

400.description: The given journey id is invalid

404.description: No vehicle sequence for the journey with the given id is known

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Get detail data about a single server by ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the server to get

parameters.name: If-Modified-Since
parameters.description: If provided the response body is empty in case the data didn't change since the given date

200.description: The server was successfully resolved based on the given id

304.description: The request was successful but the content was not modified since the last request

400.description: The given server ID is invalid

404.description: No server with the given ID was found

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Get detail data about a single server by code

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The code of the server to get

parameters.name: If-Modified-Since
parameters.description: If provided the response body is empty in case the data didn't change since the given date

200.description: The server was successfully resolved based on the given server code

304.description: The request was successful but the content was not modified since the last request

400.description: The given server code is invalid

404.description: No server with the given code was found

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: List all registered servers

parameters.name: includeOffline
parameters.description: If servers that are offline should be included in the response

parameters.name: includeDeleted
parameters.description: If servers that are deleted should be included in the response

200.description: The servers were successfully resolved based on the given filter parameters

400.description: One of the given filter parameters is invalid

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Finds a single railcar using the given SimRail api id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The SimRail api id of the railcar to get the data of

200.description: The railcar with the given id was successfully resolved

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid

404.description: No railcar can be found with the given id

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Finds a single railcar using the given id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the railcar to get the data of

200.description: The railcar with the given id was successfully resolved

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid

404.description: No railcar can be found with the given id

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Finds points that are located in a specified around around a given geo position
get.description:
Finds points that are in the given radius around the given geo position. Results are sorted by their distance to
the given geo point, ASC (nearest point first).

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Latitude from which to search in the given radius

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Longitude from which to search in the given radius

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: The radius to search around  position, in meters (defaults to 200m)

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Optional list of countries in which the points may be located

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum results to return (between 1 and 25, defaults to 10)

200.description: The search was successfully executed based on the given filter parameters

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Finds points whose name are matching the given search query
get.description:
Fuzzy searches points by the given name search query. For example the search input 'Lazy' will return 'Łazy',
'Łazy Łc', 'Łazy Ła' etc. Wildcard search patterns are not supported by this endpoint. Results are sorted by match
with the given search query, DESC (best match first).

parameters.name: searchQuery
parameters.description: The search query for the point (must be between 3 and 35 chars)

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Optional list of countries in which the points may be located

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum results to return (between 1 and 25, defaults to 10)

200.description: The search was successfully executed based on the given search query

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Get the full data of a point by its id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the point to get the data of

200.description: The point with the given id was successfully resolved

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid

404.description: No point can be found with the given id

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: List all points that are registered

parameters.name: countries
parameters.description: Optional list of countries in which the points may be located

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page of elements to return, defaults to 1

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum items to return per page, defaults to 20

200.description: The points were successfully resolved based on the given filter parameters

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Get the polyline for a specific journey

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the journey to get the polyline for

parameters.name: includeCancelled
parameters.description: If cancelled events should be included in the polyline

parameters.name: includeAdditional
parameters.description: If additional events should be included in the polyline

parameters.name: allowFallbackComputation
parameters.description: If a fallback polyline should be returned if a proper one is unavailable

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description:
Sets the content type to return, defaults to application/json but can be set
to application/geo+json to get the polyline as a geojson feature collection

200.description: The polyline for the requested journey was successfully resolved

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid

404.description: No journey can be found with the given journey id

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Finds journeys that are using the given railcars in their vehicle composition
get.description:
Finds journeys that use the given railcars in their vehicle composition on the given date. The results might be
incomplete or incorrect for journeys that were not active yet, as the result data will be based on predictions
and not the real composition of the journey.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page of elements to return, defaults to 1

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum items to return per page, defaults to 20

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: The id of the server to filter journeys on

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date of an event (ISO-8601), defaults to the current server date if omitted

parameters.name: railcars
parameters.description: The id of the railcars that must be included in the vehicle composition of the journey

parameters.name: journeyCategory
parameters.description: The category of the journey at the first playable event

parameters.name: transportTypes
parameters.description: The transport types that are returned, defaults to all types if omitted

200.description: The journeys were successfully resolved based on the given filter parameters

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid or doesn't match the described grouping requirements

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Find journeys that become playable in the provided time range
get.description:
Finds journeys that become playable in the provided time range. Optionally additional filter parameters can be
provided to narrow down the results. The provided time range must be at least 1 minute and at most 60 minutes
long. If the start time is omitted it defaults to the current server time, if the end time is omitted it defaults
to the start time plus 15 minutes.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page of elements to return, defaults to 1

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum items to return per page, defaults to 20

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: The id of the server to filter journeys on

parameters.name: timeStart
parameters.description: The start of the time range (ISO-8601 without offset), defaults to the current server time if omitted

parameters.name: timeEnd
parameters.description: The end of the time range (ISO-8601 without offset), defaults to start plus 15 minutes if omitted

parameters.name: journeyCategory
parameters.description: The category of the journey at the first playable event

parameters.name: transportTypes
parameters.description: The transport types that are returned, defaults to all types if omitted

200.description: The journeys were successfully resolved based on the given filter parameters

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid or doesn't match the described requirements

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Returns a single journey by the given id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the journey to return

parameters.name: If-Modified-Since
parameters.description: If provided the response body is empty in case the data didn't change since the given date

200.description: The journey with the given id was successfully resolved

304.description: The request was successful but the content was not modified since the last request

400.description: The given id or one of the filter parameters did not match the requirements

404.description: No journey can be found with the given journey id

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Find journeys based on one journey event matching the given search criteria
get.description:
Find journeys based on one journey event matching the given search criteria, for example:
- Searching for journey number '40180' will return 'EIP 40180', 'ROJ 40180' etc.
- Searching for 'PWJ 146051' will also return 'ROJ 19369' that starts as 'ROJ' but switches to 'PWJ' along its route
- Searching for 'RE1' at '2024-12-06' will also return journeys that start at '2024-12-05' and continue on '2024-12-06'
Multiple filter parameter can be provided and are linked in a logical AND chain. At least the journey number or
journey line must be provided.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page of elements to return, defaults to 1

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum items to return per page, defaults to 20

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: The id of the server to filter journeys on

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date of an event (ISO-8601 without timezone), defaults to the current server date if omitted

parameters.name: line
parameters.description: The line at an event, at least journeyNumber or line must be provided

parameters.name: journeyNumber
parameters.description: The number at an event, at least journeyNumber or line must be provided

parameters.name: journeyCategory
parameters.description: The category at an event

parameters.name: transportTypes
parameters.description: The transport types that are returned, defaults to all types if omitted

200.description: The journeys were successfully resolved based on the given filter parameters

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid or doesn't match the described grouping requirements

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Get all journeys that are currently active on a server
get.description:
Get descriptive information about all journeys that are currently active on a server. Data returned by this
endpoint might update irregularly. This endpoint shouldn't be used to poll journey updates, use the event system
SIT-Events instead.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: The id of the server to filter journeys on

parameters.name: If-Modified-Since
parameters.description: If provided the response body is empty in case the data didn't change since the given date

200.description: The active journeys of the given server were successfully resolved

400.description: One of the filter parameters is invalid

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Find dispatch posts based on the given filter parameters
get.description:
Finds dispatch posts paginated based on the given filter parameters. If multiple filter parameters are provided,
they get chained into a logical AND chain. If no filter parameters are provided, this endpoint acts like a
listing endpoint.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: The id of the server on which the dispatch posts should be located

parameters.name: difficulty
parameters.description: The difficulty of the dispatch posts to return (0-5)

parameters.name: pointId
parameters.description: The id of the point with which the dispatch post is associated

parameters.name: deleted
parameters.description: Filter for the deletion state of the dispatch post

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page of elements to return, defaults to 1

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum items to return per page, defaults to 20

200.description: The dispatch posts were successfully resolved based on the given filter parameters

400.description: One or multiple of the given filter parameters were invalid

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Get the detail information of a single dispatch post by its id

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the dispatch post to get

parameters.name: If-Modified-Since
parameters.description: If provided the response body is empty in case the data didn't change since the given date

200.description: The dispatch post was successfully resolved based on the given id

304.description: The request was successful but the content was not modified since the last request

400.description: The given dispatch post id is invalid

404.description: No dispatch post with the given id exists

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Get all departures within a specified timespan at a specified point
get.description:
Lists all journeys that are departing from the specified point on the specified server within the given time span.
By default, a time span of 30 minutes is returned, starting at the current server time, unless otherwise specified.
Results are sorted by realtime time information by default. A minimum time span of 5 minutes and a maximum time
span of 6 hours can be requested. The start time can be 1 day in the future and 90 days in the past.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: The id of the server to get the board on

parameters.name: pointId
parameters.description: The id of the point to get the board of

parameters.name: timeStart
parameters.description: The start time for the board, if omitted current server time will be used

parameters.name: timeEnd
parameters.description: The end time for the board, if omitted the start time plus 30 minutes will be used

parameters.name: transportTypes
parameters.description: Filter for transports that should be returned, if omitted all transports will be returned

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order of board entries, of omitted entries will be sorted by realtime time information

200.description: The departure board entries were successfully resolved

400.description: One of the given filter parameters is invalid or doesn't comply to the described constraints

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

get.summary: Get all arrivals within a specified timespan at a specified point
get.description:
Lists all journeys that are arriving at the specified point on the specified server within the given time span.
By default, a time span of 30 minutes is returned, starting at the current server time, unless otherwise specified.
Results are sorted by realtime time information by default. A minimum time span of 5 minutes and a maximum time
span of 6 hours can be requested. The start time can be 1 day in the future and 90 days in the past.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: The id of the server to get the board on

parameters.name: pointId
parameters.description: The id of the point to get the board of

parameters.name: timeStart
parameters.description: The start time for the board, if omitted current server time will be used

parameters.name: timeEnd
parameters.description: The end time for the board, if omitted the start time plus 30 minutes will be used

parameters.name: transportTypes
parameters.description: Filter for transports that should be returned, if omitted all transports will be returned

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order of board entries, of omitted entries will be sorted by realtime time information

200.description: The arrival board entries were successfully resolved

400.description: One of the given filter parameters is invalid or doesn't comply to the described constraints

500.description: An internal error occurred while processing the request

platform.description: The platform the user is playing on
The platform the user is playing on

profileUrl.description: The url to the profile of the user

avatarUrl.description: The url to the avatar of the user

location.description: The location of the user (in some form), null if not known

id.description: The unique identifier of the railcar

displayName.description: The display name of the railcar

name.description: The baptismal name of the locomotive / wagon, null if none

type.description: The grouping type of the railcar

typeIdentifier.description: The type identifier of the railcar

requiredDlcId.description: The id of the DLC that is required for the railcar, null if included in the base game

productionYears.description: The years in which the railcar was produced, can be range or single year

weight.description: The weight of the railcar in tons

width.description: The width of the railcar in meters

length.description: The length of the railcar in meters

maxSpeed.description: The maximum allowed speed of the railcar

country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the point is located

position.description: The position where the point located

uicRef.description: The UIC reference of the point, might not null in case it is unknown

osmNodeId.description: The OSM node id of the point

maxSpeed.description: The maximum speed any journey can drive at the point

stopPlace.description: Indicates if the point is a stop place (without switches) or a full station

platforms.description: The platforms at the point at which a passenger change can happen

track.description: The track where the platform is located

serverId.description: The identifier of the server where the journey takes place

lastUpdated.description: The instant (ISO-8601) when the journey data was last updated

firstSeenTime.description: The instant (ISO-8601) when the journey was first seen, null if the journey wasn't active yet

lastSeenTime.description: The instant (ISO-8601) when the journey was last seen, null if the journey is still or wasn't active

journeyCancelled.description: Indicates if the journey was cancelled

liveData.description: Current live information about the journey, omitted from the response if the journey is not active

events.description: The events along the route of the journey

cancelled.description: Indicates if the event was cancelled, note that events can be additional and cancelled

additional.description: Indicates if the event is additional (not part of the scheduled route)

stopPlace.description: Information about the stop place where the event takes place

scheduledTime.description: Scheduled time of the event in local server time (ISO-8601)

realtimeTime.description: Best known time of the in local server time (ISO-8601), precision is described by the time type field

realtimeTimeType.description: The precision of the realtime time of the event

stopType.description: The scheduled stop type for the journey at the event

scheduledPassengerStop.description: Information about the scheduled passenger stop, omitted if no passenger stop is scheduled

realtimePassengerStop.description: Realtime information about the passenger stop, omitted if the event didn't happen / didn't stop at a platform

transport.description: Information about the transport at the event

speed.description: The current, rounded speed of the journey

position.description: The current position of the journey

driver.description: The current driver of the journey

nextSignal.description: The signal in front of the journey, null in case it is too far away or doesn't exist

maxSpeed.description: The allowed speed of passing the signal, null if no speed reduction

distance.description: The distance of the journey to the signal, in 10 meter steps

platform.description: The platform of the passenger change

track.description: The track of the passenger change

id.description: The id of the stop place

name.description: The name of the stop place

position.description: The position where the stop place is located

stopPlace.description: Indicates if the point is a stop place (without switches) or a full station

inPlayableBorder.description: If the stop place is within the playable border of the map

categoryExternal.description: The external category of the transport (for example internal can be RPJ, external IR), null if the same as the internal category

line.description: The line of the transport, null in case no line is associated with the transport

label.description: The label of the transport, for example the marketing name or product name of the transport

type.description: The higher-level category of the transport

maxSpeed.description: The maximum speed (in km/h) of the journey is allowed to drive at the associated point

indexInGroup.description: The index (0 based) where the vehicle is located in the composition

loadWeight.description: The load weight of the vehicle, can be null in case nothing is loaded

load.description: The load of the vehicle, can be null in case nothing is loaded

railcar.description: Summary information about the railcar used for this vehicle

journeyId.description: The id of the journey associated with the vehicle composition

status.description: The status of the vehicle composition

lastUpdated.description: The time (ISO-8601 with offset) when the vehicle data was last updated

vehicles.description: The vehicles that are in the composition

utcOffsetHours.description: The offset of the server time from utc in hours

region.description: The region where the server is located

tags.description: Tags of the server, for example providing detail information about the moderation status

spokenLanguage.description: The language spoken on the server, null for all languages

scenery.description: The scenery (map part) that is available on the server

lastUpdated.description: The instant (ISO-8601) when the data of the server was last updated

registeredSince.description: The instant (ISO-8601) when the server was initially registered in the SimRail backend

online.description: If the server was online during the last collection

deleted.description: If the server is no longer registered in the SimRail backend

items.description: The items that are one the requested page

morePages.description: Indicates if more pages are available and can be loaded

journeyId.description: The id of the journey to which the waypoints apply

stops.description: The stops along the journey route

polyline.description: The waypoints along the journey route

id.description: The id of the stop place

name.description: The name of the stop place

inPlayableBorder.description: If the stop place is within the playable border of the map

serverId.description: The identifier of the server where the journey takes place

firstSeenTime.description: The instant (ISO-8601) when the journey was first seen, null if the journey wasn't active yet

lastSeenTime.description: The instant (ISO-8601) when the journey was last seen, null if the journey is still or wasn't active

journeyCancelled.description: Indicates if the journey was cancelled

originEvent.description: The origin (first) event of the journey

destinationEvent.description: The destination (last) event of the journey

stopPlace.description: The stop place associated with the event

scheduledTime.description: The scheduled time (ISO-8601) in local server time of the event

transport.description: The transport used at the event

cancelled.description: Indicates if the event was cancelled

category.description: The external category of the transport

categoryExternal.description: The external category of the transport (for example internal can be RPJ, external IR), null if the same as the internal category

line.description: The line of the transport, null in case no line is associated with the transport

label.description: The label of the transport, for example the marketing name or product name of the transport

type.description: The higher-level category of the transport

items.description: The items that are one the requested page

morePages.description: Indicates if more pages are available and can be loaded

stopPlace.description: The stop place associated with the event

scheduledTime.description: The scheduled time in local server time (ISO-8601) of the event

cancelled.description: Indicates if the event was cancelled

serverId.description: The identifier of the server where the journey takes place

firstSeenTime.description: The instant (ISO-8601) when the journey was first seen, null if the journey wasn't active yet

lastSeenTime.description: The instant (ISO-8601) when the journey was last seen, null if the journey is still or wasn't active

journeyCancelled.description: Indicates if the journey was cancelled

originEvent.description: The origin (first) event of the journey

destinationEvent.description: The destination (last) event of the journey

event.description: An event of the journey. The exact nature of this event depends on the context it's returned in

items.description: The items that are one the requested page

morePages.description: Indicates if more pages are available and can be loaded

serverId.description: The identifier of the server where the journey takes place

firstSeenTime.description: The instant (ISO-8601) when the journey was first seen, null if the journey wasn't active yet

lastSeenTime.description: The instant (ISO-8601) when the journey was last seen, null if the journey is still or wasn't active

journeyCancelled.description: Indicates if the journey was cancelled

originEvent.description: The origin (first) event of the journey

destinationEvent.description: The destination (last) event of the journey

liveData.description: The live data about the journey

id.description: The id of the dispatch post

name.description: The name of the dispatch post

pointId.description: The id of the point where the dispatch post is located

serverId.description: The id of the server for which the dispatch post info is valid

lastUpdated.description: The time (ISO-8601 instant) when the dispatch post was last updated

registeredSince.description: The time (ISO-8601 instant) when the dispatch post was registered in the SimRail backend

position.description: The position where the dispatch post is located

images.description: A list of image urls displaying the dispatch post

difficulty.description: The difficulty rating of the dispatch post, from 1 (easy) to 5 (hard)

realtimeData.description: Realtime information about the dispatch post

deleted.description: Indicates if the dispatch post was deleted in the SimRail backend

dispatcher.description: The user that is currently dispatching the post

items.description: The items that are one the requested page

morePages.description: Indicates if more pages are available and can be loaded

journeyId.description: The id of the journey arriving/departing at/from the requested point

eventId.description: The id of the arrival/departure event at the requested point

cancelled.description: Indicates if the event was cancelled, note that events can be additional and cancelled

additional.description: Indicates if the event is additional (not part of the scheduled route)

scheduledTime.description: Scheduled time of the event (ISO-8601) in local server time

realtimeTime.description: Best known time of the event (ISO-8601) in local server time, precision is described by the time type field

realtimeTimeType.description: The precision of the realtime time of the event

stopType.description: The scheduled stop type for the journey at the event

scheduledPassengerStop.description: Information about the scheduled passenger stop, omitted if no passenger stop is scheduled

realtimePassengerStop.description: Realtime information about the passenger stop, omitted if the event didn't happen / didn't stop at a platform

transport.description: Information about the transport at the requested point

via.description:
The events this journey goes via. For arrivals these are the events before the requested point, for departures the
events after the requested point. Events are always sorted by their index along the journey route. This means for
arrivals the events are ordered in [initial -> current] while for departures they are sorted [current -> final].

platform.description: The platform of the passenger change

track.description: The track of the passenger change

categoryExternal.description: The external category of the transport (for example internal can be RPJ, external IR), null if the same as the internal category

line.description: The line of the transport, null in case no line is associated with the transport

label.description: The label of the transport, for example the marketing name or product name of the transport

type.description: The higher-level category of the transport

maxSpeed.description: The maximum speed (in km/h) of the journey is allowed to drive at the associated point

cancelled.description: If the particular point was cancelled

additional.description: If the particular point is additional

passengerChange.description: If a passenger change is scheduled at the point

additionalProperties.description: Additional members to further narrow the core cause of the problem

type.description: A URI reference identifying the problem type

status.description: The HTTP status code generated by the server for the problem

title.description: A human-readable summary of the problem type

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to the occurrence of the problem

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem
